name: Teriyaki Salmon Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first five ingredients in a bowl.
Add the salmon steaks and marinate for 1 to 2 hours, turning every 20 to 30 minutes.
2. Place the steaks on a sheet of heavy foil.
Grill for 4 to 5 minutes, basting with the sauce, then turn the steaks and grill for an additional 3 minutes or until the steaks flake easily, basting with the sauce.
3. Serve hot or cold.
